environment_prompt: Atop a snow-covered mountain peak. Panoramic views of snow-capped peaks stretching to the horizon under a clear blue sky. Fine snow particles whipping in the wind. Colorful prayer flags fluttering on a rope line nearby. Bright sunlight overhead. Behind the viewer, a rocky ridge descends toward a snow-filled couloir. Below the summit, a narrow climbing trail with fixed ropes leads back down the mountainside.
perspective_prompt: First-person perspective, standing position at summit level, looking outward across the mountain range.

interactions.prompt: The view switches from first-person to third-person, pulling back to reveal a mountaineer in a bright red down jacket with an ice axe in hand and a coiled climbing rope over the shoulder from behind.
The view switches back to first-person, returning to the character's own eyes.
